## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly Director Standup to discuss geo-optimization strategies, content refresh workflows, and backlink strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/eLzZXxAz-7ks355vzzUu-AxSzPwjTxQt?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content refresh workflows emerging from strategy sprints can be leveraged for quick wins with clients](https://fathom.video/share/eLzZXxAz-7ks355vzzUu-AxSzPwjTxQt?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Scrunch tool provides directional input on topic visibility, but requires \~1 month of data for reliable trends](https://fathom.video/share/eLzZXxAz-7ks355vzzUu-AxSzPwjTxQt?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Backlink strategies still valuable, especially for new domains, but quality and intentionality are crucial](https://fathom.video/share/eLzZXxAz-7ks355vzzUu-AxSzPwjTxQt?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [Team to reassess backlink vendors and costs while maintaining focus on geo-optimization and citations](https://fathom.video/share/eLzZXxAz-7ks355vzzUu-AxSzPwjTxQt?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)

## Topics

### Geo-Optimization and Content Refresh

  - [Workflow article refresh being implemented for Airbyte client](https://fathom.video/share/eLzZXxAz-7ks355vzzUu-AxSzPwjTxQt?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Content refresh strategy gaining traction as quick win for clients stuck on content generation](https://fathom.video/share/eLzZXxAz-7ks355vzzUu-AxSzPwjTxQt?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Leveraging Scrunch tool to identify strategic content for refresh based on AI citations](https://fathom.video/share/eLzZXxAz-7ks355vzzUu-AxSzPwjTxQt?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Refresh particularly useful for ranking but outdated content (e.g., Yerco client)](https://fathom.video/share/eLzZXxAz-7ks355vzzUu-AxSzPwjTxQt?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)

### Scrunch Tool Usage and Limitations

  - [No definitive way to validate search queries; tool uses "peek and poke" method](https://fathom.video/share/eLzZXxAz-7ks355vzzUu-AxSzPwjTxQt?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Aim for topic coverage rather than tracking individual prompts](https://fathom.video/share/eLzZXxAz-7ks355vzzUu-AxSzPwjTxQt?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Claude AI useful for generating potential queries and categorizing them](https://fathom.video/share/eLzZXxAz-7ks355vzzUu-AxSzPwjTxQt?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [1 month of data recommended as minimum for confident trend analysis in Scrunch](https://fathom.video/share/eLzZXxAz-7ks355vzzUu-AxSzPwjTxQt?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)

### Backlink Strategies

  - [Debate on continuing to offer backlinks vs. focusing on citations and organic mentions](https://fathom.video/share/eLzZXxAz-7ks355vzzUu-AxSzPwjTxQt?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [Current backlink quality could be improved; team not paying enough for high-quality links](https://fathom.video/share/eLzZXxAz-7ks355vzzUu-AxSzPwjTxQt?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Backlinks still valuable, especially for new domains or page-level competition](https://fathom.video/share/eLzZXxAz-7ks355vzzUu-AxSzPwjTxQt?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [Proposal to offer backlinks as targeted packages rather than ongoing service](https://fathom.video/share/eLzZXxAz-7ks355vzzUu-AxSzPwjTxQt?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)

### Backlink Strategy Refinement

  - [Assess current vendors and explore options for better quality at same or lower cost](https://fathom.video/share/eLzZXxAz-7ks355vzzUu-AxSzPwjTxQt?tab=summary&timestamp=1324.0)
  - [Increase intentionality in selecting link sources and target pages](https://fathom.video/share/eLzZXxAz-7ks355vzzUu-AxSzPwjTxQt?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [Focus on pages with traffic and existing backlinks for more impactful results](https://fathom.video/share/eLzZXxAz-7ks355vzzUu-AxSzPwjTxQt?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
  - [Position backlinks as a maturity-based offering, with higher costs for established sites](https://fathom.video/share/eLzZXxAz-7ks355vzzUu-AxSzPwjTxQt?tab=summary&timestamp=1603.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to reassess backlink vendors and ongoing costs](https://fathom.video/share/eLzZXxAz-7ks355vzzUu-AxSzPwjTxQt?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)
  - [Team to position backlinks in context of geo-optimization and citations when discussing with clients](https://fathom.video/share/eLzZXxAz-7ks355vzzUu-AxSzPwjTxQt?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
  - [Update client database before Marcel's account review](https://fathom.video/share/eLzZXxAz-7ks355vzzUu-AxSzPwjTxQt?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
  - [Continue leveraging content refresh workflows from strategy sprints for quick wins](https://fathom.video/share/eLzZXxAz-7ks355vzzUu-AxSzPwjTxQt?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Use Claude AI for generating and categorizing potential search queries for Scrunch](https://fathom.video/share/eLzZXxAz-7ks355vzzUu-AxSzPwjTxQt?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
